headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on ONEOK, Raises Price Target to $81
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Michael Blum   maintains ONEOK (NYSE:OKE) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $79 to $81.

headline: 12 High-Yield Oil And Gas Stocks For Income Investors In March 2026
summary: MPLX, CQP, and PBR lead the list based on a composite score of EBITDA yield, ROE, dividend yield, and payout ratio bonuses. Read more details here.
